title: Death of the Beds for Bedwars
description: a bedwars texture pack, for simple and easy pvp
body:
# Death of the Beds
Is a Bedwars texture pack by plixel
___
This texture pack changes 1.8.9 textures so players experience better Bedwars PVP.
edit: released on 1.21+
___
New features in works: Low Fire and Cleaner wool
___
Check the ****gallery**** for texture pack features
___
Death of the Beds © 2024 by plixel
